meaning: Translation of hello how are you doing
Translation of i am doing good
Translation of i was playing football
Translation of अहं फुटबॉलक्रीडां कुर्वन् आसीत्
Translation of i am playing game

example: अहं भक्षामि फलम् (aham bhakshami phalam) - I eat a fruit

english: I will come with you too
meaning: expression of accompaniment; statement of togetherness
example: मया सह आगच्छ, अहं तव सहाय्यं करिष्यामि - mayA saha Agaccha, ahaM tava sahAyyaM kariShyAmi

english: I am not able to go
meaning: inability to go; incapacity to move
example: यदि अहं गन्तुं न शक्नोमि तदा किम् करोमि |

meaning: I reside in Nagpur; My home is in Nagpur
example: अहं नागपुरे वसामि सुखम् - aham nagapure vasami sukham (I live in Nagpur happily)

sanskrit: Aham golaakaandasya praatiyaa battingaprekshayaa adhikam prīti karoṣi
devanagari: अहं गोलाकाण्डस्य प्रतिया बैटिंगप्रेक्षया अधिकम् प्रीति करोषि
english: I like bowling more than batting
pronunciation: Ah-hum goh-lah-kaan-dah-syah prah-tee-yah bah-tee-ting-prayk-shah-yah ah-deekum pree-tee kah-roh-see
meaning: preference for bowling over batting; enjoying bowling more
example: मया गोलाकाण्डस्य प्रतिया बैटिंगप्रेक्षया अधिकम् प्रीति क्रियते - Mayā golākāṇḍasya pratīyā baiṭiṅgprēkṣayā adhikam prīti kriyate (I enjoy bowling more than batting)

sanskrit: ahaM tvaM pashyaami tvaM khadati vaartaam
devanagari: अहं त्वं पश्यामि त्वं खादति वार्ताम्
english: I like to watch television while eating food
pronunciation: aham tvam pashyaami tvam khaadati vaartaam
example: अहं त्वं पश्यामि त्वं खादति वार्ताम्, मम भोजनस्य समये

english: He likes to watch TV while eating
example: सः भोजनं खादन् दूरदर्शनं द्रष्टुं रोचते | (He likes to watch TV while eating)
